channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: PPP Chairman Advocates Political Dialogue for Balochistan Peace
item.description: PPP Chairman Bilawal Bhutto-Zardari emphasized the necessity of political dialogue to resolve Balochistan's political issues, reaffirming the party's commitment to engaging with all political forces, ...

item.title: India's Diplomatic Focus on Awards for Modi Raises Concerns
item.description: The article critiques the Indian Foreign Service's growing obsession with securing foreign awards for Prime Minister Narendra Modi, arguing that this focus undermines India's diplomatic credibility. I...

item.title: Calgary Police Search for Missing 11-Year-Old with Neurodivergent and Non-Verbal Traits
item.description: Calgary police have issued an Amber Alert for an 11-year-old boy, Parker, who went missing from his day home in the Thorncliffe neighborhood. The alert was granted under an exemption due to Parker's n...

item.title: US troops killed in Jordan as tensions escalate with Iran over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The conflict between the United States and Iran has intensified, with US forces reporting two deaths and one missing in Jordan following an Iranian attack. The renewed strikes, which include targeting...

item.title: The Flawed Comparison Between Zondo and Madlanga Commissions: A Call for Contextual Analysis
item.description: Cornelius Monama argues that comparing the Zondo and Madlanga commissions is inherently flawed due to their differing mandates, resources, and outcomes. The Zondo commission, established to investigat...

item.title: Senator Lacson Condemns Cayetano's Attacks, Claims Informants May Lead to Legal Action
item.description: Senator Panfilo 'Ping' Lacson condemned Senator Alan Peter Cayetano's attacks on his integrity, stating that the latter has crossed the line by questioning his character. Lacson emphasized that his in...

item.title: Hawks Officer's Cocaine Evidence Under Scrutiny
item.description: The Madlanga Commission of Inquiry has intensified its scrutiny of Warrant Officer Mbongeleni Felix Mpangase, who faced allegations of falsifying records related to a 27kg cocaine seizure. Mpangase, a...

item.title: Cody Webb raises funds and awareness for Menslink with daily half-marathons
item.description: Cody Webb, a public servant from Fadden, is undertaking an extraordinary challenge by running a half-marathon every day in July to support Menslink, an organisation that provides support for men's men...

item.title: France Regulates Unauthorized Betting Sites by Blocking Polymarket Access
item.description: France's regulatory authority for licensed gambling and betting games has ordered internet service providers (ISPs) to block access to Polymarket, a decentralized prediction market platform. This move...

item.title: Gwadar Port Maintains Operations Amid Regional Tensions, Solidifying Its Role as a Key Trade Hub
item.description: Gwadar Port continues uninterrupted commercial operations despite regional maritime tensions, with the arrival of a Bangladesh-flagged vessel carrying steel billets destined for the UAE. The M/V Jahan...

item.title: Kylian Mbappe breaks Lionel Messi's World Cup goal record with 22 career goals
item.description: Kylian Mbappe has surpassed Lionel Messi's career World Cup goal record, reaching 22 goals. During the 2026 FIFA World Cup, Mbappe scored 10 goals, two more than Messi's 21 in the tournament's history...

item.title: Tragic cross-border police pursuit ends in fatal crash
item.description: A man has died following a high-speed police chase that crossed the Queensland and New South Wales border. The incident began when a 25-year-old man, believed to be armed with a firearm, was reported ...

item.title: Philippine exorcism center bridges faith and mental health care
item.description: The Philippine School for Exorcists, located in Makati City, serves as a unique institution training priests and clergy from across Asia to address spiritual and psychological challenges. Established ...

item.title: Canadian Sports Broadcaster Rod Black Chronicles His Career in New Book
item.description: Nova Scotia's iconic sports broadcaster Rod Black has released a new book detailing his illustrious career spanning decades in Canadian media. The book, which serves as a comprehensive chronicle of hi...

item.title: Lungi Ngidi's evolution as a versatile fast bowler
item.description: Lungi Ngidi's mastery of the slower ball and adaptability as a fast bowler have solidified his status as a fan favorite in South African cricket. The article highlights his journey from being overshad...

item.title: Carmina Villarroel at Zoren Legaspi: Mga aral mula sa matagal na kasal
item.description: Ang artikulong ito ay nag-uulat ng mga kakaibang estratehiya at tip para sa mapanatag na relasyon, partikular na ang naging sukat ng Carmina Villarroel at Zoren Legaspi. Ang kasal nila, na nagsimula n...

item.title: Tornado warning issued for Clearwater County after traffic camera captures storm in central Alberta
item.description: A tornado was captured on camera by a traffic surveillance system in central Alberta, prompting a warning for communities in Clearwater County. The incident occurred on July 18, 2026, and highlights t...

item.title: DOJ allows TikTok on government devices after ownership transfer
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ) has announced that federal employees can now download TikTok on their official government devices, reversing a 2022 ban. This decision follows a legal change triggered ...

item.title: Telugu film explores domestic strife and hidden violence through a housewife's journey
item.description: The Telugu film 'Maa Inti Bangaaram' follows Swarna, a former revolutionary turned housewife, as she navigates the complexities of her new life. Her attempts to win over her in-laws, who distrust her ...

item.title: US and Iran Escalate Military Conflict with Airstrikes and Retaliation
item.description: The United States launched airstrikes on Iran following the killing of two American troops in Jordan and the disappearance of a third, prompting Iran to retaliate by targeting US military bases in Kuw...
